issues.description: High face density (111.1 faces/cm3) — may indicate tight internal radii
issues.suggestion: Verify minimum internal corner radius is >= 1mm for standard endmills

issues.description: High face density (111.1 faces/cm3) — may indicate tight internal radii
issues.suggestion: Consider simplifying the geometry or using a different material with higher tolerance to reduce the need for 5-axis machining.
